plugins.name: anja
plugins.description: Claude Code plugin: wiki strutturato + memoria identitaria + ricerca semantica del codice per progetti dev. 28 MCP tool (wiki CRUD/maintenance + roadmap + code search hybrid 3-livelli + sessions + memory). Provider embedding pluggable: OpenRouter, Voyage AI, OpenAI, local. Auto-summary background sessione + roadmap focus al SessionStart. Schema .anjawiki/ wire format pubblico (vedi SCHEMA.md).
